full_text:
Wu Qiong (Deyu) 伍瓊 (德瑜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Qiong (伍瓊), styledDeyu (德瑜), was born in Runan. Advised Dong Zhuo to recruit worthy men and acted as a spy for Yuan Shao. Wu Qiong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wu Qiong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
